creator: tony@git-pull.com
text:
Created attachment 158176
Minitube error downloading video data in left pane.

$ pkg info minitube

$ freebsd-version -ku; uname -apKU
10.2-PRERELEASE
10.2-PRERELEASE
FreeBSD z600 10.2-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 10.2-PRERELEASE #5: Fri Jun 26 10:34:21 CDT 2015     root@z600:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/MYKERNEL  amd64 amd64 1001519 1001519

Error downloading https://gdata.youtube.com/feeds/api/videos?v=2&max-results=10 ...

Screenshot of error Attached.
